# Copilot Area 07 Instructions

Do not execute files, authenticate, connect integrations, scan, probe, enumerate, exploit, contact people, collect access material, run simulations, deploy active content, persist, evade, move laterally, extract data, deny service, publish, clean up, retest, accept risk, or close findings.
